headline: Northern Trust Backs First Autocallable ETF In Europe As ETF Role Grows
summary: Northern Trust (NasdaqGS:NTRS) supported the launch of the first autocallable ETF in Europe on the Waystone platform. The new ETF introduces an autocallable structure to the European ETF market for the first time. The partnership highlights Northern Trust’s role in servicing complex ETF products in the region. Northern Trust is primarily known for asset servicing and custody, and this move into supporting an autocallable ETF adds a new layer to the type of products it services in Europe...
